app.title: A localized MiniX booking desk
app.subtitle: This demo uses i18next, i18next-fetch-backend, x-i18n directives, and the component instance APIs this.$t and this.$i18n.

hero.heading: Welcome, {{name}}.
hero.copy: Your itinerary is prepared for {{count}} guest.

hero.copy_other: Your itinerary is prepared for {{count}} guests.

itinerary.title: Itinerary
itinerary.subtitle: These rows are translated inside an x-for loop with $t.
